plan_summary.plan_name: Europe's first certified Faraday enclosure launch
plan_summary.primary_goal: Reach EUR 50k net cash from operations by Month 12 to unlock EUR 350k follow-on funding for a server-grade pivot.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Year-1 commercial launch of a single-SKU Faraday enclosure with a two-tier price ladder; tests whether pre-sales volume and gross margin clear the EUR 50k cash trigger, fund EU EMC certification, and absorb the 2,000-unit ISO production commitment.

key_values.label: Year-1 operational budget
key_values.comment: Year-1 cash envelope covering production, certification, marketing, ops, contingency. Caps all Year-1 spending.
key_values.source_text: Year-1 operational burn budget: EUR 400k - input to period 1 cash burn.

key_values.label: Funding-gate cash trigger
key_values.comment: Net cash from operations needed by Month 12 to unlock the EUR 350k follow-on tranche.
key_values.source_text: EUR 50k net cash from operations by Month 12 unlocks follow-on funding.

key_values.label: Premium enclosure retail price
key_values.comment: Two-tier pricing premium SKU. Drives ARPU and contribution margin.
key_values.source_text: Two-tier pricing: EUR 79 fabric pouch, EUR 149 full metal enclosure.

key_values.label: BOM cost per enclosure
key_values.comment: Laptop-combo BOM cost. Variable material cost subtracted from price to derive unit margin.
key_values.source_text: Phone-only enclosure BOM EUR 45 vs laptop combo BOM EUR 75.

key_values.label: ISO run materials and tooling cost
key_values.comment: Sunk fixed cost if the 2,000-unit Tallinn ISO run is committed. Year-1 production line item.
key_values.source_text: ISO run raw materials and tooling cost is EUR 150k.

key_values.label: ISO production run size
key_values.comment: Minimum order quantity for the ISO-certified run. Caps Year-1 sellable inventory once committed.
key_values.source_text: Minimum order quantity for ISO run is 2,000 units per run.

key_values.label: Six-month pre-sale absorption target
key_values.comment: Pre-sale threshold required within 6 months to self-fund the ISO run and pivot path.
key_values.source_text: Pre-sales must absorb at least 1,500 units within 6 months.

key_values.label: Year-1 non-production fixed costs
key_values.comment: EUR 80k EMC certification + EUR 100k marketing + EUR 50k operations + EUR 20k contingency from the Year-1 plan.
key_values.source_text: EUR 80k certification + EUR 100k marketing + EUR 50k operations + EUR 20k contingency.

derived_questions.question: Does Year-1 demand absorb enough of the 2,000-unit ISO run to avoid inventory overhang?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Unsold ISO inventory both wastes BOM cash and starves the pivot. Tests whether expected demand clears the inventory floor.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Pre-order conversion rate from targeted traffic
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Without a validated conversion rate the 1,500-unit pre-sale target is speculative; drives expected units sold.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: A/B test landing page with 10% vs 50% deposit on prepper forums; benchmark against direct-to-consumer hardware launches (typical 1-5%).

missing_values_to_estimate.label: European active prepper buyers reachable in Year 1
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Population denominator for the conversion funnel; ceiling on Year-1 unit demand.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Use stated 15,000-20,000 active-buyer range as base; refine via 500-person survey and forum panel size.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Retailer wholesale discount on premium SKU
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Net ARPU on the 1,000-unit retailer channel is unknown without the discount; large impact on gross profit.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Obtain written terms from SurvivalAid.de and at least two European prepper retailers (expected 40-50%).

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Retailer guaranteed Year-1 volume
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Wholesale channel volume needed to combine with direct pre-sales into total expected Year-1 units sold.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Confirm 1,000-unit white-label volume in writing with SurvivalAid.de before committing to ISO run.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Expected Year-1 units sold across channels
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: All cash, margin, and trigger calculations depend on this volume estimate.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Year-1 gross profit before fixed costs
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Translates volume into the cash that has to cover fixed costs and the EUR 50k cash trigger.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Net cash from operations by Month 12
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: The realised value tested against the EUR 50k funding-gate threshold.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Funding-gate cash surplus
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive means the EUR 350k follow-on tranche is unlocked; the single most load-bearing gate in the plan.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Year-1 cash envelope surplus
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether Year-1 commitments fit inside the EUR 400k envelope before any revenue is earned.

unmodelled_gates.label: EU EMC Directive CE certification
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Without CE marking via a notified body the enclosure cannot be sold in the EU at all; pre-sales and retailer terms presuppose this gate passes.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Year-1 sales halted, EUR 80k certification spend lost, follow-on tranche withheld.

unmodelled_gates.label: Renegotiation of funding trigger to measurable metric
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Without converting the vague 'positive cash flow' clause into the EUR 50k Month-12 net-cash metric, even a passing model is exposed to discretionary funder withholding.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Follow-on funding can be withheld even when the financial model passes, project terminated.

unmodelled_gates.label: Baltic ISO supplier capacity confirmation
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: The financial model assumes Tallinn ISO and Latvian non-ISO shops have available capacity for the 500/2,000-unit runs; without signed slots the schedule slips by months.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Production delay of 3-4 months pushes first sales past Month 12 and forfeits the cash trigger.
